CONTENT.Career: Coudert signed a professional intern contract with Tours on 23 June 2017. He made his first team debut for the club in a 2–1 Ligue 2 loss to Nancy on 8 December 2017. He moved to Amiens in the summer of 2019, and signed his first senior professional contract on 29 June 2020.On 5 July 2021, Coudert signed a one-year contract with Brest.
CONTENT.External links: Grégoire Coudert at SoccerwayLFP ProfileGrégoire Coudert at L'Équipe Football (in French)

SUMMARY: Grégoire Coudert (born 3 April 1999) is a French professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for  Ligue 1 club Brest.
